Metadata.CommitMsg:
feat(v2): implement Phase 1-3 redesign - IA update, design tokens, page rebuild

Phase 1 — Information Architecture:
- Remove tenant-services.html from primary navigation
- Archive tenant-services.html to pages/_archive/
- Add tenant FAQ section to contact.html
- Update all footer links from Tenant Services to Tenant FAQ
- Rename Landlords nav label to For Landlords across all pages
- Update README.md and context.md to reflect new page inventory

Phase 2 — Design System Refresh:
- Add modular type scale (--text-xs to --text-5xl, 1.25 ratio)
- Add spacing scale (--space-1 to --space-9)
- Darken --text-muted for WCAG AA contrast on cream backgrounds
- Make navbar sticky with scroll shadow (navbar--scrolled class)
- Modernise search form into elevated card with grid layout
- Refresh property cards with clearer hierarchy and spacing tokens
- Add reduced-motion media query for accessibility
- Apply spacing tokens throughout all sections

Phase 3 — Page-by-Page Rebuild:
- Apply new design tokens to index.html, properties.html, landlord-services.html, contact.html, about.html
- Remove solid class from navbar (now uses sticky scroll behavior)
- Add FAQ section styles to contact.html
- Update responsive breakpoints with spacing tokens
- All JS hooks remain intact (search.js, main.js, admin.js, tenant-landlord.js)

TODO placeholders remain untouched for client input.
No changes to v1 folder or admin panel structure.
Metadata.Author: AdamScholey25 <adamscholey25@gmail.com>

Misconfigurations.Title: Image user should not be 'root'
Misconfigurations.Description: Running containers with 'root' user can lead to a container escape situation. It is a best practice to run containers as non-root users, which can be done by adding a 'USER' statement to the Dockerfile.
Misconfigurations.Message: Specify at least 1 USER command in Dockerfile with non-root user as argument
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Add 'USER <non root user name>' line to the Dockerfile
